clues: In 2025, he set personal bests with 135 games played and led all MLB catchers with 19 Defensive Runs Saved.
Nationality: American; He is a rare switch-hitting catcher who became the first at his position in franchise history to record a 'Splash Hit' home run into the cove.
In 2023, he became the first rookie catcher in history to record a walk-off home run and a walk-off pickoff in the same season.
He spent his first two seasons catching for staff ace Carlos Rodón before Rodón left for New York.
He plays Catcher for the San Francisco Giants
In the 2024-25 season, he appeared in all 82 games and averaged 11.1 points and 2.5 made three-pointers.
He ranks second all-time in three-pointers made during the first eight seasons of an NBA career.

He plays Guard for the Golden State Warriors

He entered the league playing in the same offense as star veteran running back Aaron Jones.
He plays Wide Receiver for the Green Bay Packers

In 2022, he became the first player in Mariners history to win AL Rookie of the Year while recording 25+ home runs and 25+ stolen bases in the same season.

He plays Center Field for the Seattle Mariners
